visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene opens in a brightly lit Costco warehouse interior. A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a brown quilted winter jacket with a fur-trimmed hood, stands prominently in the center-left. She holds a large, transparent plastic bag containing four long, multi-grain baguettes crusted with seeds. Above her, a large digital overlay displays the red and blue 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo. A bold yellow and red variety text '回來了' appears at the center. The background features open refrigerated food cases, white tile flooring, and distant shelves filled with bulk goods. (2) The camera maintains a medium shot as the woman presents the bread closer to the viewer. A decorative text box appears on the left detailing the product name and price in Traditional Chinese. She gestures toward the bag and gives a thumbs-up with her right hand. An off-screen hand enters the frame from the lower right corner, pointing directly at the texture of the bread through the plastic wrap. The lighting is uniform, high-key industrial lighting characteristic of a large retail store. (3) The woman smiles broadly while shifting the bread bag slightly to show the bottom. A new graphic featuring a yellow megaphone icon and the text '滿滿的健康' appears on screen. The background remains the same warehouse setting, with price tags and other bakery items visible in the soft-focus distance. She maintains direct eye contact with the camera, exhibiting an inviting and persuasive facial expression. The visual rhythm is fast-paced with quick straight cuts between these subtle presentation shifts.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 回來了. [Subtitle]: 回來了回來了 好市多終於又回來了. (2) [Variety]: 歐式高纖穀粒 長棍麵包 四個299. [Subtitle]: 這個高纖穀粒長棍麵包 四個299. (3) [Subtitle]: 超好吃 然後上次我們拍影片介紹完 竟然停工了好一陣子. (4) [Subtitle]: 這個超棒 冬天有沒有必買 配濃湯什麼都好吃. (5) [Subtitle]: 配醬也超讚 然後最重要是滿滿的高纖穀粒. (6) [Variety]: 滿滿的健康. [Subtitle]: 你吃得到滿滿的健康 我覺得這個很值得買. (7) [Subtitle]: 價格超划算 趕快哦現在又進了 趁這一波他剩一點點很值得.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 2 female shoppers in background, 1 male hand pointing from off-screen.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Young female with long black hair, wearing a thick brown winter jacket with a fur hood.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Costco warehouse interior with industrial shelving, refrigerated open-top displays, and price signage.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio track opens with a high-arousal male narrator speaking rapidly in Mandarin, delivering an enthusiastic announcement. He uses a bright, professional tone with significant pitch variability to capture attention. Simultaneously, an upbeat, rhythmic electronic pop BGM starts with a strong 4/4 synthetic kick drum and bright synth melodies. A subtle 'whoosh' sound effect emphasizes the first visual graphic transition. (2) As the narrator lists the price and product name, his vocal intensity remains high and projected. The music maintains a steady tempo of approximately 124 BPM, providing an energetic backdrop. Subtle rustling sounds from plastic packaging are audible beneath the voice, suggesting physical handling. A light 'pop' SFX is heard as a new text overlay appears on screen. (3) The narration continues at a fast pace, urging consumers to act quickly. The BGM remains constant in volume and texture, exhibiting a positive major-mode tonality. The acoustic spectrum is dominated by the high-frequency clarity of the voice and the percussive elements of the music. The recording ends with the voice concluding its persuasive pitch and a brief instrumental tail of the BGM.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To inform Costco members about the restocking of a popular bakery item and to encourage immediate purchase through high-energy recommendation and price highlighting.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed product presentation, price highlighting, and urgent call-to-action typical of influencer recommendations.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes a high-arousal narration style and fast-paced editing to create a sense of urgency and excitement around a common grocery item.
